description_long: This is a sleek, modern military-style airplane with a dark, matte finish and angular, stealth-inspired design. The fuselage is compact and robust, with a forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit featuring a tinted canopy. The wings are sharply swept back with pronounced anhedral angles and integrated winglets, giving the aircraft an aggressive, aerodynamic profile. Twin jet engines are mounted at the rear, flanking a central tail section with twin vertical stabilizers and a high-mounted horizontal stabilizer. The undercarriage appears to be retractable, with gear doors visible beneath the fuselage. The overall appearance suggests a high-performance, tactical aircraft designed for speed and maneuverability.
description: A dark, angular, stealth-inspired military airplane with swept-back wings, twin rear jet engines, and a forward-enclosed cockpit.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pointed nose, forward cockpit canopy, and wide, swept-back wings with visible winglets and twin vertical stabilizers.
description_view_1: Rear-side view highlights the twin jet engines, angular tail section, and the detailed pattern on the upper wing surfaces.
description_view_2: Direct rear view displays the two large jet exhausts, twin vertical stabilizers, and the retracted landing gear bay.
description_view_3: Opposite rear-side view emphasizes the symmetry of the tail, engine placement, and the anhedral wing configuration.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with sharply swept, anhedral wings and integrated winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted at the rear fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Twin vertical stabilizers with a high-mounted horizontal stabilizer (H-tail configuration).
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear with visible gear doors.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single canopy, likely single-seat.
